title: Use 'collect' with 'Streams' instead of 'list::add'
description: The 'collect' method should be used with 'Streams' instead of 'list::add'. The 'collect' method is a superior choice because it is inherently thread-safe and can be parallelized.
impact: Using 'collect' with 'Streams' instead of 'list::add' can significantly improve the performance and safety of your code by making it thread-safe and parallelizable.

checks.message: Use 'collect' with Streams instead of forEach with method reference
